strategies.name: mean_reversion_aggressive
strategies.description: Buy when RSI < 30 (oversold). Exit when RSI > 50.

strategies.name: mean_reversion_conservative
strategies.description: Buy when RSI < 30 AND price within 2% of lower Bollinger Band. Exit when RSI > 50.

strategies.name: trend_following
strategies.description: Buy when EMA 13 crosses above EMA 50 with MACD bullish. Sell when EMA 13 crosses below EMA 50.

strategies.name: momentum
strategies.description: Buy when price crosses above EMA with positive momentum. Exit on momentum flip.

strategies.name: price_action
strategies.description: Buy on support breakout. Sell on resistance hit.

strategies.name: volume
strategies.description: Buy on volume spike combined with price move. Exit when volume normalizes.

strategies.name: ma_cross
strategies.description: Buy when short MA crosses above long MA, sell on reverse.

strategies.name: macd
strategies.description: Buy when MACD crosses above signal line, sell on reverse.

strategies.name: bbands
strategies.description: Buy at lower band support, sell at upper band resistance.
